name: remotion
description: quilt — animated demos (hero + social) for the README and socials

scripts.render:social: bun run sfx && remotionb render src/index.ts social out/quilt-social.mp4
scripts.render:all: bun run poster && bun run render:hero && bun run render:social
scripts.gif: remotionb render src/index.ts hero out/quilt-header-raw.gif --codec=gif --every-nth-frame=2 --scale=0.5 && gifsicle -O3 --lossy=80 --colors 128 out/quilt-header-raw.gif -o ../docs/assets/readme/quilt-header.gif
